expectations.evidence: Single article with thematic organization. No Part 1/Part 2 labels, though the structure does follow the original order somewhat (retrieval topics first, then generation).
'Reranking' subsection covering cross-encoders and Cohere API
'Handling Hallucinations' section covering faithfulness checking and NLI models
RAGAS framework mentioned under 'Automated Evaluation with RAGAS' heading
No TL;DR section present. Article starts directly with introduction paragraph.
No Key Takeaways section. Has 'The Full Pipeline at a Glance' numbered list instead, which is different.
No sources section at the end of the article
Proper markdown with headers, bold, bullet lists, numbered list
